<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Logging\TeamCity\Subscriber; use PHPUnit\Event\Test\Skipped; use PHPUnit\Event\Test\SkippedSubscriber; /** * @internal */ final class TestSkippedSubscriber extends Subscriber implements SkippedSubscriber { public function notify(Skipped $event): void { $this->logger()->testSkipped($event); } }
